final:
module top_module(
  input [15:0]  a,
  input [15:0]  b,
  input         sel,
  output [15:0] res
  );assign res = {sel ? a + b : a - b};

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (sel) begin
        $display("Error: Addition should not be performed");
      end else begin
        $display("Error: Subtraction should not be performed");
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
